data_source: godotengine/godot-demo-projects (GitHub, shallow clone --depth 1, https://github.com/godotengine/godot-demo-projects). All .tscn and .tres files concatenated. 45 files used to reach 1,000,000 chars.
encoding_notes: Godot Engine scene format: INI-like text with [section] headers, key=value pairs, typed literals (Vector2, Color, PackedVector2Array, etc.), and resource references (ExtResource, SubResource). Files are UTF-8 text — highly structured, rule-governed, repetitive (every node has type, parent, transform, and resource refs in fixed patterns). Treated as raw character stream — character-level entropy measures the notation's compressibility.

shuffled_control.note: Shuffling destroys all sequential structure; structure_score collapses to ~0, confirming the signal is genuine sequential constraint.
